bead.title: cli: repair Helix wrapper align entrypoint
bead.description:
PROBLEM
`bin/helix help` and `bin/helix align --help` fail with `/Users/erik/Projects/helix/scripts/helix: No such file or directory`, so this repo cannot run the required `helix align` completion check and the published plugin wrapper is broken.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
`bin/helix:22` execs `$plugin_root/scripts/helix`, but `scripts/helix` is no longer tracked. `git show --name-status a18d8ba -- scripts/helix bin/helix` shows the scope-collapse commit deleted `scripts/helix` while adding this wrapper. Existing coverage in `tests/validate-skills.sh:237-248` copies `bin/helix` into a temp plugin root and creates a fake temp `scripts/helix`, so it validates delegation mechanics but never proves the real repo/package contains the delegated target.

PROPOSED FIX
Settle and implement the live contract: either restore a minimal tracked `scripts/helix` for the survivor `help` and `align` surfaces, or update `bin/helix`, docs, and tests to the actual supported entrypoint. The repo checkout must provide a deterministic way to run the alignment completion check.

NON-SCOPE
Do not resurrect deprecated queue-control wrappers such as `helix run`, `helix build`, `helix check`, `helix worker`, or `helix commit` unless the chosen help/align contract explicitly requires compatibility shims.
bead.acceptance:
1. Add deterministic validation, suggested as a `test_bin_helix_repo_target_exists` shell check in `tests/validate-skills.sh`, that exercises the real repo `bin/helix` and fails if its delegated target is missing. Do not rely only on temp fake `scripts/helix` probes.
2. `bin/helix help` exits 0 from a fresh repository checkout and its output matches the current scope-collapse contract in `README.md` and `AGENTS.md`.
3. `bin/helix align --help` or `bin/helix align repo --dry-run` exits 0 from a fresh repository checkout. If the intended replacement is not a CLI, update `bin/helix`, `README.md`, and `AGENTS.md` to name the deterministic alignment check command instead.
4. `bash tests/validate-skills.sh` passes.
5. `bash tests/validate-context-digests.sh` passes.
6. `git diff --check` passes.
7. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
